args.message: Excellent question! The transmission and drivetrain on this Tahoe are in fantastic shape. It shifts smoothly through all gears, no hesitations, no clunks, just pure, consistent power delivery. We actually just had our master technician give it a full inspection and a fluid flush, and he confirmed everything is running perfectly. As for upcoming maintenance, you're all set! All fluids are fresh, brakes are solid, tires have plenty of tread. This Tahoe is truly turn-key and ready for thousands more miles of trouble-free driving. You won't have to budget for anything major for a good long while.
